name: auth-magic-link
description: Passwordless magic link sign-in flow with email entry, check-email confirmation, resend countdown, and expired link handling
postMessage:
Magic link auth installed!

Usage:
import { MagicLink } from '@/components/auth-magic-link'

<MagicLink
  onSendLink={async (email) => { /* send magic link email */ }}
  onBackToSignIn={() => router.push('/login')}
/>

Requires shadcn/ui: npx shadcn@latest add button input card label
